title: NaWorld DH&Optimization
description: Modpack for Survival Players, Architects, and Adventurers
body:
Website
Discord
---
🌐 繁 體 中 文 🌍 English
這個模組包適合 🛡️ 生存、🏗️ 建築 及 🗺️ 冒險玩家

• 🛡️ 生存玩家：加入多款生存輔助模組，提升遊戲便利性與體驗
• 🏗️ 建築玩家：新增 Axiom 與 WorldEdit 等強大建築工具
• 🗺️ 冒險玩家：加入第一人稱視覺強化與探索體驗優化模組

⚙️ 客戶端與伺服器端皆可運行 		This modpack is designed for 🛡️ Survivors, 🏗️ Builders, and 🗺️ Adventurers

• 🛡️ Survivors: Includes various quality-of-life and survival-assist modules
• 🏗️ Builders: Adds powerful building tools such as Axiom and WorldEdit
• 🗺️ Adventurers: Enhances exploration with first-person visual improvements and immersive features

⚙️ Runs on both client and server sides
--- ## ⚠️ Important Notices | 重要通知 ⚠️
❗ Troubleshooting Guide | ❗ 疑難排解指南 ## ❗ Troubleshooting Guide | ❗ 疑難排解指南 ### 🌏 繁體中文 #### 🔍 前置檢查 - ✅ 已安裝正確版本的 Java（**Java 21**） 適用於 **Minecraft 1.20.5–1.21.11+** - ✅ **分配足夠記憶體：** 建議配置為 **4–8 GB**。 若使用高品質材質包、更遠的視野距離（例如啟用 **Distant Horizon** 或 **Bobby**）時，建議依實際需求提升記憶體分配，以確保遊戲流暢運行。 #### 🛠 常見問題與解決方案 - 🟥 **遊戲崩潰：** 嘗試移除最近新增的模組 - 🟨 **畫面異常：** 關閉光影或調整顯示設定 - 🟦 **效能低落：** 降低視野距離，或關閉高負載材質包／光影／模組（如 **Distant Horizon**） --- ### 🔧 模組相容性說明 > 🔸 **FlashBack 渲染說明** > 使用前請先停用 **CustomSkinLoader** 模組，否則 FlashBack 將無法正常運作。 > 🔸 **Distant Horizon 與 Blur+ 模組顯示衝突** > 同時啟用 **Blur+** 模糊效果與 **Distant Horizon**，可能導致畫面異常或出現重影。 > 💡 解決方式：請先在 **Mod Menu** 關閉 Blur+，確認渲染正常後再重新啟用。 > 🔸 **Bliss Shader 光影渲染問題（太陽光黑線）** > 問題源自 **3D Skin Layers** 模組，在光照場景中可能導致黑線出現。 > 💡 請在光影設定中關閉 **Fast Render** 並啟用 **Compatibility Mode（相容模式）** --- ### 🌐 English #### 🔍 Initial Checks - ✅ Java Version: Ensure **Java 21** is installed Compatible with **Minecraft 1.20.5–1.21.8** - ✅ **Allocate sufficient memory:** Recommended allocation is **4–8 GB**. If you're using high-resolution resource packs or extended render distance (e.g., with **Distant Horizon** or **Bobby**), increase memory allocation accordingly to maintain smooth performance. #### 🛠 Common Issues & Fixes - 🟥 **Game Crashes:** Remove recently added mods - 🟨 **Visual Glitches:** Disable shaders or adjust display settings - 🟦 **Performance Drops:** Reduce render distance or disable high-load content (e.g., **Distant Horizon**) --- ### 🔧 Mod Compatibility Notes > 🔸 **FlashBack Render Instructions** > Before rendering and exporting, disable **CustomSkinLoader** — FlashBack will not function properly otherwise. > 🔸 **Distant Horizon and Blur+ Rendering Conflict** > Enabling **Blur+** and **Distant Horizon** together may cause ghosting or screen artifacts. > 💡 Fix: Disable **Blur+** via the **Mod Menu**, ensure rendering is stable, then re-enable if needed. > 🔸 **Bliss Shader Rendering Issue (Black Lines in Sun Rays)** > Caused by the **3D Skin Layers** mod when sunlight is active. > 💡 Fix: In shader settings, **disable Fast Render** and **enable Compatibility Mode**
